title: MoveOrderResult
description: Acknowledgement returned by POST /players/me/units/{unitId}/move. The unit's status is now 'moving'; a UNIT_UPDATE WebSocket event will fire when it arrives.

startAt.description: Temporary debug field. ISO-8601 timestamp when movement started on the server.

arrivalAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the unit will arrive. Use this to drive client-side movement animation.

origin.description: Temporary debug field. Unit position when the move was ordered.

destination.description: Temporary debug field. Target position for this move order.

distance.description: Temporary debug field. Surface travel distance in hex units (1 = largest intra-hex distance).
